title: Onboarding - Permission for location tracking - Don't Allow - Cancel [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: User denies location tracking during onboarding and cancels permission prompt on Find My Device screen, then returns to Poly Lens Menu.
steps: Log in or continue as guest
expected: After step 5, a location permission popup appears with options (Allow Once, Allow While Using App, Don't Allow). After step 10, a permission prompt with Cancel and Enable Now appears. After step 11, the app navigates back to the Poly Lens Menu.
